_note: Round-6 follow-up #3: pre-fix native's runes fn_component gate (default_export.rs:should_emit_fn_component_shape) included an exclusion for any non-empty `exported_locals` from the instance-script SplitScript, plus exclusions for `<svelte:options strictEvents />`, `$$slots/$$restProps/$$props` substring matches, and `export let` in the instance OR module script. None of those affect upstream's gate (`addComponentExport.ts:343`: `isRunesMode() && !usesSlots && !events.hasEvents()`) — they were drift that pushed otherwise-eligible runes components onto the iso `$$IsomorphicComponent` shape, breaking `Parameters<typeof Comp>` / `(typeof Comp)[]` consumers (the iso shape's `new(...)` ctor signature can't be satisfied by a callable-only function expression). Producer here has runes mode and an exported function (`export function foo()`); pre-fix native picked iso, so Consumer's `(typeof Producer)[]` return type fired TS2322. Post-fix native picks the fn-component shape (Component<P, X, B>, callable-only), matching upstream, and Consumer type-checks clean.
